name: Tag

semanticTypeCandidates.evidence: Small colored label for status indication
Pill-shaped chip for categorization and filtering

representativeVariants.name: Default Tag
representativeVariants.whySelected: Neutral tag — muted background, sharp 4px radius

representativeVariants.name: Primary Tag
representativeVariants.whySelected: Orange tag for active/highlighted status — brand accent

representativeVariants.name: Removable Tag (pill)
representativeVariants.whySelected: Pill-shaped chip with close button — for filter chips
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Text: '数据分析' + close icon (12px, muted-foreground, margin-left var(--space-1))

anatomy.description: Short text, 1-3 Chinese characters or 1-2 words
Optional 12px close icon for removable variant

structurePatterns: Inline-flex container, items center, gap var(--space-1)
Text: no text-transform, single line, nowrap

bestPractices: Use semantic colors: primary for active, success for done, warning for pending, error for failed
Removable pill variant for filter chips
Keep label text to 1-3 characters for readability
Tags are inline, not block — use in tables, cards, lists

doNotInvent: Outlined tags with transparent background (use filled style)
unknowns: Exact alpha for colored backgrounds — infer 12% of semantic color
keyInsightSeed: Small flat labels, pill radius for chips, orange variant for highlights
